text.content:
Individual that secretly collects and reports information on the activities, movements and plans of a political or corporate enemy or competitor. Also known as a spy or intelligence operative.

Qualifications Soc 6+
Survival Int 6+
Commision Edu 7+
Advancement Edu 6+
Re-enlistment 6+

 

Ranks and Skills
0 Agent  Streetwise-1
1 Special Agent  
2 Sp Agent in Charge  
3 Unit Chief  
4 Section Chief Admin-1
5 Assistant Director  
6 Director

2 +1 Int 5 000
3 Weapon 10 000
4 Mid Passage 10 000
5 +1 Soc 20 000
6 High Passage 50 000
7 Explorers Society 50 000

1 +1 Dex Admin Gun Combat Advocate
